passives.name: Giant Slayer
passives.effects: Deal {{pp|type='''maximum''' health difference|color=health|key=%|0 to 15 for 11|0 to 2500|formula=0.6% per 100 greater '''maximum''' health}} increased damage against enemy champions with greater {{as|'''maximum''' health}} than you.

effects_structured.raw: Deal increased damage against enemy champions with greater maximum health than you, scaling with max health difference.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified Giant Slayer scaling semantics from page-level source and Tier-1 datasets: damage amp scales with max-health difference and caps at 15% once the difference reaches 2500.
Patch-history note: older Arena values used higher max amplification; current structured values keep Tier-1-aligned 15% cap.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
